title: quercus ilex var. smilax
intro: Quercus ilex var. smilax, also known as the Holm Oak or Philosopher's Tree, is a variety of the Quercus ilex tree native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its small, spiny branches and dark green, leathery leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and polyphenols. The health benefits of Quercus ilex var. smilax include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cognitive function, and protect against oxidative stress. Quercus ilex var. smilax can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies.
